title: Tan & Chan Dental
address: 67, Jalan USJ 21/10, Usj 21, 47630 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: webnation
reviews.text: Explained every procedures and possible outcomes clearly before the surgery.  Fees at fair charges.  Duly professional. Keep it up this way.

reviews.name: Richard Lee
reviews.text: Very bad service! Very arrogant.

reviews.name: Phung Jun Yean
reviews.text: I've been here a couple times and I'll say that both Dr. Tan and Dr. Chan have been extremely attentive and patient during my sessions. They are always willing to answer my questions and display strong sense of professionalism in their work. Booking an appointment here was a breeze as well (I booked through WA). Would highly recommend this place for your dental needs.

reviews.name: Renuga Govindan
reviews.text: Dr Chloe Chan is very attentive and gentle. She explains the procedure well, I feel at peace. Pricing is very reasonable. It’s truly a pleasure to have her as my go to dentist across the many years.

reviews.name: Shannica Preethy
reviews.text:
Atmosphere: clean and peaceful

How to book: make an appointment via WhatsApp, quick and easy. Make a booking in advance.

Procedure: Scalling and polishing

Doctor Gerald Nicholas was very kind, polite and explained the procedure before and after. He also took pictures of my teeth to show the difference before and after.

Quite frankly, he is the first dentist I have been to that has taken the time to explain and answer all my questions as well as to educate me on proper brushing technique and how to take care of my teeth.

The price was reasonable as I only had to wait 5-10 minutes in between patients.

It was a smooth procedure overall and I would highly recommend him as he’s extremely professional and caring towards his patients concerns.

Highly recommend place to fix your teeth issues. Thank you Dr Gerald.

title: Klinik Pergigian USJ
address: 35, Jln USJ 8/2B, Usj 8, 47610 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Ilham Wahyudi
reviews.text: Dokter mau tanya sy ada masalah gigi depan goyang dan memanjang.bs gak gigi dipertahan dan di perbaiki.klu bisa sy akan datang.sebab sy duduk dekat jee di cort 10

reviews.name: Felina
reviews.text:
The doctor and receptionist is very friendly and soft spoken. Although it takes a long time and you have to come early, but its cheap and good. However, it's better to call before coming to know if they can still accommodate more customers.

So far so good no complaints.

reviews.name: bandy Amir
reviews.text:
Sampai pukul 11 pagi tggu sampai pukul 3 pon x siap cek lg gigi berdenyut tggu giliran org semua 4 org lg satu org 2 jam
Aku rasa mahu pukul 5 pon x cek lg
Kalah pulak klinik kerajaan
Mmg bad service lah

reviews.name: Doris Sidi
reviews.text: Good service, price cheaper, soft and gentle to the patient. Suggest to open appointment.

reviews.name: Calvin Chan Mun Wong
reviews.text: Need to arrive early to q up , bring along folding stool or chair for waiting 😜 be patient ! Price charges cheaper than any other dental clinic . Pricing posted

reviews.name: DILA YATIMS
reviews.text: The best doctor Ravi  ...dari KL sanggup pegi klinik sini...dah 25tahun i dgn doctor Ravi sahaja💯⭐ ...

reviews.name: Chaotar Meow
reviews.text: Does not allow appointments, walk-ins come 2 hours before the clinic opens and queue at the door to be first in line, the wait to see dentist can be up to 4-5 hours long, and only equipped for basic procedures. Did a tooth filling here once and it had to be re-done elsewhere because of an underlying issue on the tooth which this guy did not detect (because no xray) before doing the filling. Not recommended if more major or complex procedures are required.

reviews.name: Lily Yeoh
reviews.text: Dr Justin was attentive and friendly. He’s always willing to explain or clarify if i have any questions or concerns, which i appreciate.

title: M Dental Clinic Subang SS15
address: 32G, Jalan SS15/4, Ss 15, 47500 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Katie Hicks
reviews.text: I went to M Dental recently and was given amazing treatment. Dr Chang was friendly, welcoming and very professional - as were the whole team. The clinic itself is beautiful and calming. I had a scale and polish and left feeling great! I will definitely be back.

reviews.name: Hi Edwin
reviews.text: ​Finding a dentist you completely trust is rare, but Dr. Chang WS has been an absolute blessing. I’ve followed Dr. Chang from their previous clinic to M Dental Clinic Subang SS15 because the care I receive is always 100% perfect. Every treatment is done with so much patience and excellence. I am incredibly grateful for Dr. Chang's dedication and highly recommend them to anyone looking for a dentist who truly cares! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.name: Zhi Xin Lim
reviews.text: Had a really pleasant experience with Dr. Chang. She’s professional, gentle, and takes the time to explain everything clearly, which made me feel very comfortable throughout the treatment. You can genuinely tell she cares about her patients and pays attention to details. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a trustworthy and skilled dentist!

reviews.name: ariel gan wei xuan
reviews.text: i had a great experience! Doctor Chang was great, very patient and gentle.

reviews.name: ST Tom Teh
reviews.text: Dr Chang has been really helpful and detail oriented in explaining information related to penjagaan gigi! 5 stars and will definitely come back again

reviews.name: Angee Ng
reviews.text:
I had my chipped tooth 2 days ago and not able to travel back to Ipoh so soon. I called M Dental and visited for a chipped tooth, and I’m truly grateful for the care I received. Dr. Chang WS is a young dentist with exceptional skill, patience, and genuine kindness. She took the time to explain every step, made sure I was comfortable, and handled the treatment with such gentle precision.

My tooth looks and feels perfect again. Thank you, Dr. Chang WS for your professionalism and your caring approach.

Angie Ng

reviews.name: dyan afiarti
reviews.text: On the day I had this severe pain tooth on sunday I called every dental clinics and all of them were fully booked. Luckily thank god Kami Dental was willing to check my condition even at 6pm. The staff is friendly and soft spoken. The female dr that operated me swiftly less an hour for minor surgery is so kind and soft spoken. The environment, ambience is perfect. First day was painful but today my sweeling and pain was less alhamdulillah. Thank you dr that operated me, I don’t know your name but pls come to this clinic.

reviews.name: mirrah syahida samad
reviews.text: Lokasi klinik yg sgt baik, interior yg sgt selesa dan bersih. Pekerja dan doktor sgt baik dan menjelaskan setiap procedure yang perlu. Experience yg sgt baik semasa mencabut gigi.. recommended dan akan ke sini lg untuk next2 treatment

title: Klinik Pergigian Alam Impian - Subang
address: No 3-1(Ground Floor), Jalan Merpati Seksyen 26, UEP Subang Jaya, 47650 Subang, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Wendy Chau
reviews.text: I experienced pain when eating after my filling. The dentist who did my first filling on Sunday was a part-time doctor. I informed her that the pain was still there after the filling, but she said it would go away. As the pain persisted, I returned the next morning to see another dentist. Unfortunately, the dentist did not review my records and asked me the same questions again. After taking another X-ray, the filling was redone, but the procedure was very painful despite the anaesthetic, which only numbed my gums, not the tooth. My pain is still there, and the issue remains unresolved. Overall, I am disappointed with the professionalism and treatment I received.

reviews.name: haida
reviews.text: do my scaling with Dr Roshini, shes great and make sure her patient is comfortable. will ask you if theres any discomfort or if it hurt

title: Subang Dental Specialist Clinic
address: No 49 GF, Jalan USJ 10/1f, Taipan Business Centre, 47620 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Michelle liew
reviews.text:
I had a loose implant that was originally done by another dentist. After consulting several dentists who were unable to resolve the issue, I decided to see Dr. Ha based on the many positive recommendations I had heard.

I’m delighted to say that he fixed the problem quickly and professionally. He carefully removed the implant crown, inspected the gum and implant connection, reassembled everything, and confirmed the fit with an X-ray. The entire process was smooth and reassuring, and the issue was resolved with ease. I am happy to finally have peace of mind.

A special mention to his efficient nurses and the friendly, helpful reception team, who made the whole experience pleasant from start to finish.

Thank you, Dr. Ha and team, for your expertise and excellent care. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Quin SQ
reviews.text: Thank you Dr Ha and Dr Vivian and team at Subang Dental Specialist. You made the wisdom tooth removal by surgery as smooth as possible and explained clearly to me. Thank you for putting up with my nervousness - you did everything you could to keep me calm. I am very grateful

reviews.name: M.Esther Lin
reviews.text:
Nice to see dr Jing Jing

reviews.name: Artanto Ishaam
reviews.text:
Dr. Quah is the best dentist so far we got in KL/Selangor. He straight to the point, explained the issue, and settled it. No upsell treatment. Even he waived my daughter check up because it (the teeth) was looked in good condition.

5th time check up with him now and already brought the whole of my family. ~RM120 for a scaling, super affordable.

Staff is also professional in taking care the appoinment.

The only minus is it's difficult to find parking nearby.

Super recommended clinic & doctor!

reviews.text: Good service, Dr Quah very professional and provide good advice

reviews.text:
After dinner I found my teeth was partially Crack, Immediately I checked on Google for this dental clinic and whatsup to made appointment, Very fast I get my appointment on the next day  morning.
But after filing I feel that my tooth surface is not smooth, I go 3 times to get rid of the irritation, but until I have my tooth being fix, the 3 spots still with uneven surface that made me feel very uncomfortable. I give up going there again.
I have to get root canal and treatment  for my top 3rd teeth, and filing for a few front teeth To get  minor filing.

I had a wonderful experience at Pixel Dental. From the moment I walked in, the staff were very friendly, welcoming, and professional. The dentist was gentle, patient, and explained the treatment clearly, which made me feel comfortable throughout the entire process.

The clinic is clean and well-organized, and the pricing is very reasonable for the quality of service provided. I am very happy with my treatment and the overall experience.
Highly recommended to anyone looking for a trustworthy and caring dental clinic. Thank you, Pixel Dental!

title: Lim Dental Surgery Sdn. Bhd - Subang Jaya
address: 91A, Jalan SS 15/4b, Ss 15, 47500 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: SK
reviews.text: I saw Dr Wong on 27 June 2016. She was meant to do a quick check on my teeth but instead drilled through without briefing me on what it meant and gave me a poor filling. After failing to fix the filling, I got someone else to fix it, but I will never forgive Dr Wong for the lifetime of pain she now left me.

reviews.name: Pj Lee
reviews.text:
Was attended by Dr Trilochan a very caring dentist. She did my bridge work before and today on my latest visit a root canal. Am not the easiest of patients, I told her given a choice between seeing a ghost and a dentist, I will choose the ghost anytime. Ghosts they can only frighten you but a dentist with her armoury of drills, needles and pliers they are a different ball game. I will lie if I say the root canal was a piece of cake, it was okay because Dr Trilochan at every stage was comforting me to make the whole experience okay, giving me time even to say a short prayer. What makes her stand out is not only her expertise but her understanding of the fear of an adult turned child on the dentist chair.

My follow up visit after a week break to complete the root canal treatment. I noticed as before that most of Dr Trilochan patients are senior citizens. Sure we seniors tend to have more dental problems but on the other hand, we seniors are also much wiser as well. What we want is a dentist who is EXPERIENCED and CARING. When someone is holding a drill in hand, we want that person to be only one thing, EXPERIENCED and I had such a dentist attending to me.
Must mention here as well the super woman behind the dentist Ms Devi. She is what multi skilling personified means. She is the receptionist, the cashier, the dentist assistant, the x-ray operator and also the one who cleans up after all is done. With this post I pray I don't have to visit Lim Dental again unless absolutely necessary or I need a ghost more fearsome than a dentist.

reviews.name: Eke Nazri Rahim
reviews.text: Very professional and service is excellent

title: PosiTeeth Dental
address: 25-1, Jalan SS 15/8b, Ss 15, 47500 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Nurain Nabilah Salehuddin
reviews.text:
I went to check-up the huge hole on my bottom molar. Dr. David suggested I do an x-ray to confirm and as it turns out the nerve has been affected and the tooth is already necrotic. He was thorough with the explanation of the problem and solution. He even provided the costs without me needing to ask, which I find nice and such a transparent thing to do to the patients.

After going through the solutions, I proceeded with extraction and essix retainer to delay the teeth shifting while I ponder if I wanted to do an implant.

Tooth extraction was quick and painless. I am afraid of having needles going into my gums, but the Dr. put on numbing cream before so I felt nothing. Had to do a double shot though because I felt a tiniest sting when he was working on my gums. But after that, the process was completely painless.

The recovery was smooth sailing. Followed the aftercare to avoid dry socket. I was prescribed with painkiller after having a bit of trouble sleeping. Then , I had a quick visit to make an impression for my retainer and was able to pick it up after a few days!

Everyone was reassuring and gentle throughout my visits here.

The procedures and prices:
X-ray: RM100
Normal extraction: RM150
Essix retainer + 1 pontic tooth: RM250 + RM50

Anyway, overall, I had a pleasant experience here, from the doctor, DAs and staff alike. I think this might be my go-to dental clinic from now on!
